activities.title: PIMNAS 38 - Universitas Hasanuddin
activities.description: Participated in the National Student Scientific Week presenting our IoT-based smart home automation project. Great experience competing with teams from across Indonesia!

activities.title: IoT Workshop & Hackathon 2024
activities.description: Hands-on workshop on building IoT devices with ESP32 and sensors. Learned about MQTT protocols and cloud integration for smart device communication.

activities.title: Final Year Project Presentation
activities.description: Presenting my capstone project on machine learning-based traffic monitoring system using computer vision and embedded systems.

activities.title: Tech Community Meetup Banda Aceh
activities.description: Monthly tech meetup discussing latest trends in AI, IoT, and web development. Networking with fellow developers and sharing knowledge about embedded systems.
